title: The Only Neat Thing to Do
display_title: The Only Neat Thing to Do
wikitext:
[]: The Only Neat Thing to Do             Quote Post by cat42 » Sun Jun 07, 2009 6:28 pm This is of course random speculation, but I read the story recently (if you intend to the the story yourself, stop right here, because I'm planning on revealing the end) which as many of us know, was the title of the final episode in the proposal. Reichu's Translation of the Proposal wrote: Final Episode: "The Only Neat Thing to Do" On the stage of the destroyed laboratory, all mysteries and drama are concluded. The denouement.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Sun Jun 07, 2009 6:53 pm "Denouement" is just the translation I used. Overanalyzing the original Japanese term would be better. More Heinlein for ya: Up to the storyboard stage, episode 25' was going to be called "The Door Into Summer" instead of "Air".

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Sun Jun 07, 2009 7:17 pm On the Episode 25' front, the booklet for Refrain of Evangelion (the Best of CD, not that Yoko Takahashi CD) mentioned for the commentary of Thanatos ~if I can't be yours~ that (paraphrased:) "summer is the time that lets a young boy grow or where there's a lot of homework in store*, so it's only natural the final episode was released in then". Just some food for thought. *I'm assuming this is referring to how kids in Japan only get a month or so off from school and they're expected to do homework in the meantime?

[]:             Quote Post by cat42 » Tue Jun 30, 2009 9:44 am (Wow, 3 weeks later...) I had somehow forgotten about the Door into Summer subtitle (which is odd, since I read that story shortly before I read The Only Neat Thing to Do) Going with that title, once again, I'd say it's a reference to the important concept behind the story. The idea that they were all looking for their own door into summer just like the cat was. Hell, potentially, I'd argue that Door into Summer would've fit 26' better than 25', especially when considering how Lilith/Rei got everyone to let down their AT Fields.

[]:             Quote Post by FallenTabris » Wed Jul 01, 2009 5:03 am ^^^I'd figure instrumentality is very underway by episode 26, so the door coulda been 25. Any other names that changed?

[]:             Quote Post by cat42 » Wed Jul 15, 2009 11:24 am FallenTabris wrote: ^^^I'd figure instrumentality is very underway by episode 26, so the door coulda been 25.

[]:             Quote Post by Otakon 08 Ikari » Wed Jul 15, 2009 12:16 pm Pretty cool Theory, Shinji killing himself seems a little odd since hes the main character but still cool.

[]:             Quote Post by cat42 » Wed Jul 15, 2009 12:42 pm Otakon 08 Ikari wrote: Pretty cool Theory, Shinji killing himself seems a little odd since hes the main character but still cool.

[]:             Quote Post by Otakon 08 Ikari » Wed Jul 15, 2009 12:51 pm I know I just wanted Shinji to go on living is all.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Wed Jul 15, 2009 2:19 pm The bit about "vanish" was implicitly referring to where "vanish" actually occurred in the translation, namely here: Both Eva Unit-06 and the American continent vanish completely.

[]:             Quote Post by Otakon 08 Ikari » Wed Jul 15, 2009 4:23 pm I thought only Nevada vanished?

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Wed Jul 15, 2009 4:33 pm Proposal =/= Finished Show

[]:             Quote Post by THE Hal E. Burton 9000 » Wed Jul 15, 2009 6:31 pm um, is anybody remembering Arka/Aluka here? scroll down on this page: http://www.windsong.demon.co.uk/nge/manyworlds.html also: http://forum.evageeks.org/viewtopic.php?t=3406

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Wed Jul 15, 2009 7:48 pm THE Hal E. Burton 9000 wrote: um, is anybody remembering Arka/Aluka here?

[]:             Quote Post by THE Hal E. Burton 9000 » Thu Jul 16, 2009 12:23 am ^we're alluding/speculating as to how Rebuild might end, right?

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Thu Jul 16, 2009 12:44 am Proposal =/= Rebuild Gee, this is fun...

[]:             Quote Post by THE Hal E. Burton 9000 » Thu Jul 16, 2009 12:57 am ^this should all be like adult Christmas time for you, though besides, what makes you so darn certain Anno will not go and use something from the Proposal after all?

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Thu Jul 16, 2009 2:46 am Hal. Topic. Learn to. Thank you.
